feed.title: Docket updates for X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Entry #187 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is OpenAI's Motion to Modify the Scheduling Order. ECF No. 183 . The Court hereby ORDERS a response to the motion by Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/14/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/14/2026)

entry.title: Entry #186 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Notice received from the Ministry of Justice, People's Republic of China re: Request for Taking of Evidence re: 101 Order (saw) (Entered: 04/14/2026)

entry.title: Entry #185 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. re 183 MOTION Motion to Modify Scheduling Order re 61 Scheduling Order,,, Order Referring Case to ADR,,, 184 Brief/Memorandum in Support of Motion to Modify Scheduling Order (Fredricks, Scott) (Entered: 04/13/2026)

entry.title: Entry #183 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: MOTION Motion to Modify Scheduling Order re 61 Scheduling Order,,, Order Referring Case to ADR,, filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order) (Fredricks, Scott) (Entered: 04/13/2026)

entry.title: Entry #182 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., and OpenAI, L.L.C. SHALL file their Response to the 178 Motion by April 23, 2026. Additionally, Plaintiffs SHALL file any Reply on or before ten days after the OpenAI defendants file their Response. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 4/10/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/10/2026)

entry.title: Entry #181 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court are the Unopposed Motion to Seal and X Corp.'s Motion to Compel. ECF Nos. 177 -78. The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motions be referred to Judge Ray for further proceedings. Motions referred to Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/10/2026) (saw) (Entered: 04/10/2026)

entry.title: Entry #180 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 178 MOTION to Compel Discovery from the OpenAI Defendants and for Expedited Briefing, 179 Brief/Memorandum in Support of Motion (Redacted) (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 04/09/2026)

entry.summary: Brief/Memorandum in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 178 MOTION to Compel Discovery from the OpenAI Defendants and for Expedited Briefing (Redacted) (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 04/09/2026)

entry.title: Entry #178 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: MOTION to Compel Discovery from the OpenAI Defendants and for Expedited Briefing filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order) (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 04/09/2026)

entry.title: Entry #177 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of its Motion to Compel Discovery from the OpenAI Defendants and for Expedited Briefing (Sealed pursuant to motion to seal) filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit(s) Proposed Sealed Brief in Support of Motion to Compel, # 2 Exhibit(s) Proposed Sealed Appendix in Support of Brief in Support of Motion to Compel, # 3 Proposed Order)(Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 04/09/2026)

entry.title: Entry #176 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the 172 Motion to Compel that OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., and OpenAI, L.L.C. filed on April 3, 2026. Plaintiffs SHALL file their Response to the motion by April 17, 2026. Additionally, the OpenAI defendants SHALL file any Reply ten days after Plaintiffs file their Response. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 4/7/2026) (jnp) (Entered: 04/07/2026)

entry.title: Entry #175 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court are Open AIs Unopposed 171 Motion to Seal and OpenAI's 172 Motion to Compel. The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motions be referred to Judge Ray for further proceedings. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/6/2026) (mmw) Modified motion linkage on 4/7/2026 (jnp). (Entered: 04/06/2026)

entry.title: Entry #171 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Motion for Leave to File Under Seal OpenAI's Brief and Appendix in Support of its Motion to Compel (Sealed pursuant to motion to seal) filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Sealed Brief in Support of Motion to Compel, # 2 Proposed Sealed Appendix in Support of Motion to Compel, # 3 Proposed Order)(Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (Hancock, Katherine) (Entered: 04/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #170 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: AMENDED 167 NOTICE OF APPEARANCE for Ralph H. Duggins, Scott A. Fredricks, Philip Vickers and Kate Hancock on behalf of OpenAI Foundation, Open AI, L.L.C. and OpenAI OpCo, LLC //// ANSWER to Complaint with Jury Demand filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC. Unless exempted, attorneys who are not admitted to practice in the Northern District of Texas must seek admission promptly. Forms and Instructions found at www.txnd.uscourts.gov, or by clicking here: Attorney Information - Bar Membership. If admission requirements are not satisfied within 21 days, the clerk will notify the presiding judge. Attorneys are further reminded that, if necessary, they must comply with Local Rule 83.10(a) within 14 days or risk the possible dismissal of this case without prejudice or without further notice.Attorney Scott A Fredricks added to party OpenAI OpCo, LLC(pty:dft) (Fredricks, Scott) Modified on 4/3/2026 (mmw). (Entered: 04/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #169 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC ORDER denying 168 Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice of Stephen DiPrima. Clerk shall return admission fee to Applicant.(Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 4/3/2026)(chmb) (Entered: 04/03/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-04-03 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Order on Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice

entry.title: Entry #168 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice with Certificate of Good Standing for Attorney Stephen DiPrima (Filing fee $100; Receipt number ATXNDC-16331699) filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit(s) Certificate of Good Standing, # 2 Proposed Order) (Hurst, Michael) (Entered: 04/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #167 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: NOTICE of Attorney Appearance by Philip A Vickers for Ralph H. Duggins, Philip Vickers, and Kate Hancock on behalf of OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C.. (Vickers, Philip) (Entered: 04/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #166 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: The Court DENIES OpenAI's Motion to Compel Discovery (ECF No. 146 ) and DENIES Plaintiffs' request for attorney fees. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 2/27/2026) (saw) Modified docket text on 3/2/2026 (saw). (Entered: 02/27/2026)

entry.title: Entry #161 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Sealed ORDER: Before the Court is the Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of the Opposition to the OpenAI Defendants' Motion to Compel that Plaintiffs filed February 11, 2026. ECF No. 157 . The Court GRANTS the Motion. Plaintiffs shall file a redacted copy of their opposition as they have requested. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 2/20/2026) (saw) (Entered: 02/20/2026)

entry.title: Entry #160 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is Plaintiffs X Corp. and X.AI LLC's Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of the Opposition to the OpenAI Defendants' Motion to Compel and for Appropriate Relief. ECF No. 157 . The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motion is referred to Judge Ray. Motion(s) referred to Magistrate Judge Mark Pittman. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 2/11/2026) (saw) (Entered: 02/11/2026)

entry.title: Entry #159 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 158 Response/Objection (Redacted) (Reiser, Craig) (Entered: 02/11/2026)
